title: API Management and Developer Portal System

prd.oneLiner: Connect API catalogs, documentation, consumer registration, keys and permissions, version lifecycle, and usage analysis.
prd.goal: Maintain 95% or more documentation freshness and owner assignment for active APIs.
prd.whyNow: API documentation, access keys, version changes, and usage data are separated, weakening developer experience and safe operations.
prd.problem: API documentation, access keys, version changes, and usage data are separated, weakening developer experience and safe operations.
prd.solution: Connect API catalogs, documentation, consumer registration, keys and permissions, version lifecycle, and usage analysis.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Developer consuming an API
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: API documentation, access keys, version changes, and usage data are separated, weakening developer experience and safe operations.

targets.name: Platform and API operations coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: API documentation, access keys, version changes, and usage data are separated, weakening developer experience and safe operations.

scenarios.text: Developer consuming an API completes api registration, key issuance, and access-request submission and checks progress.
Platform and API operations coordinator reviews api usage, errors, consumers, and version-migration reporting.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Maintain 95% or more documentation freshness and owner assignment for active APIs.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: API registration, key issuance, and access-request submission
API, version, consumer, key, usage, and status lookup
API publishing, documentation review, key approval, and version retirement management
API usage, errors, consumers, and version-migration reporting
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
